title: Initialize workspace and copy templates
acceptance: workspace 模板文件齐全且 error sinks 已创建

title: Route goal into source-tutorial kickoff questions
acceptance: DECISIONS.md 包含 source intake 说明和 C0 问题块

title: Create or validate source manifest
acceptance: manifest 至少包含 1 个有效 source 且字段完整

title: Ingest and normalize supported sources
acceptance: 至少 1 个 required source ingest 成功并写出 provenance

title: Write tutorial spec from ingested sources
Build concept graph from tutorial spec
acceptance: 概念图为非空 DAG 且核心概念覆盖 tutorial spec

title: Plan tutorial modules
acceptance: 每模块有 objectives 和 concrete outputs

title: Add exercises to each tutorial module
acceptance: 每模块至少 1 个可验证练习

title: Audit module grounding against sources
acceptance: 每个模块都映射到 source IDs 或显式记录缺口

title: Build per-module tutorial context packs
acceptance: 每模块生成 1 个 context pack 且包含 objective/source snippets/exercise seed

title: Human approve learner profile and tutorial structure
Write tutorial prose from approved packs
acceptance: 正文是 article-first tutorial 且模块顺序与已批准 plan 一致

title: Scaffold article LaTeX from tutorial
acceptance: latex/main.tex 存在且无 Markdown 残留

title: Compile tutorial article PDF
acceptance: article PDF 编译成功并有 build report

title: Scaffold Beamer slides from tutorial
acceptance: slides TeX 生成成功且包含 beamer 文档骨架

title: Compile Beamer slides PDF
acceptance: slides PDF 编译成功并有 build report
